title: Looker Studio Community Visualization
description: Represents a Looker Studio community visualization manifest that defines the visualization's metadata, resource locations, data requirements, and style configuration. The manifest is a JSON file hosted on Google Cloud Storage.

name.description: The display name of the visualization.

organization.description: The organization or developer that created the visualization.

description.description: A text description of what the visualization does.

logoUrl.description: URL to the visualization's logo image.

devMode.description: Whether the visualization is in development mode. Development mode disables caching for faster iteration.

components.description: The visualization components defined in this manifest.

Component.description: A single visualization component within the manifest.

id.description: The unique identifier for this component.

name.description: The display name of the component.

description.description: A text description of the component.

iconUrl.description: URL to the component's icon image.

Resource.description: The JavaScript and CSS resources required to render the visualization.

js.description: URL to the visualization's JavaScript bundle.

css.description: URL to the visualization's CSS stylesheet.

Config.description: Configuration defining data requirements, style options, and interactions.

data.description: Data configuration specifying required dimensions and metrics.

style.description: Style configuration specifying user-configurable style elements.

interactions.description: Interaction configurations defining supported user interactions.

DataConfig.description: Defines a data source slot with its dimension and metric requirements.

id.description: Unique identifier for this data configuration.

label.description: Display label for this data source slot.

elements.description: The dimension and metric elements for this data source.

type.description: Whether this element accepts dimensions or metrics.

StyleConfig.description: Defines a group of style elements in the property panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for this style group.

label.description: Display label for this style group.

elements.description: The individual style elements in this group.

id.description: Unique identifier for this style element.

type.description: The type of style input to render.

defaultValue.description: The default value for this style element.

supportedActions.description: The types of actions this interaction supports.
